summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Smart Digital Solutions website - backend APIs 100% functional, frontend 95% functional with only minor UI feedback issues

ui_bugs.issue: Language options are available and functional but text changes may not be immediately visible during automated testing
Success toast message may not be clearly visible during automated testing, though form submission works correctly

design_issues.issue: Minor console warning about HTML hydration error with nested spans in select options

passed_tests: All backend API endpoints (12/12 tests passed)
Contact form submission to backend API
Admin dashboard loads and displays messages and stats correctly
Admin message management (mark as read, reply, delete)
Homepage loads with all sections (Hero, Services, Pricing, Portfolio, Contact)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (core functionality working, minor UI feedback issues)
